name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Beo4
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a B&O Beo4 infrared protocol code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Command
config_entries.description: The command to send, e.g. 0x01=num1, 0x0d=mute,..., see dumper output for more info.

config_entries.label: Source
config_entries.description: The 8-bit source to send, e.g. 0x00=video,0x01=audio,..., see dumper output for more info.
